title: Exclude Templates showing in 'MyTask'

posts.author: jaronransley (Jaron R)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m creating a template where people have preassigned tasks, but those tasks are still showing in Peoples ‘MyWork’ even though the board is a template?

Is there a way to exclude people on templates from showing in MyWork?

Cheers,
Jaron.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @jaronransley ,

Welcome to the monday community!

You can filter which boards show up on my work.

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: jaronransley (Jaron R)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, thank you for your response.

I’m hoping for another solution as I’d have to make all of my staff do this & is a bit of a tedious takes tbh.

Thank you again for you suggestion.
